summary: Phase 5 WhatsApp Integration testing complete. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All 12 frontend UI tests passed (100%). The Interakt WhatsApp integration includes webhook endpoint, AI chatbot auto-response, admin unified inbox, takeover/automate mode switching, and auto-lead creation.

backend: POST /api/webhook/whatsapp accepts Interakt webhook payload and returns 200
GET /api/admin/whatsapp/conversations returns list of WhatsApp conversations
POST /api/admin/whatsapp/conversations/{phone}/automate switches back to AI mode
Webhook stores message in human mode without AI auto-reply
Conversation has lead_created flag set to true
Lead exists with source=whatsapp and inquiry_type=WhatsApp Chat
frontend: WhatsApp nav link in admin sidebar
Take Over / Switch to AI button visible
Switch to AI returns to AI mode

critical_code_review_comments: WhatsApp webhook correctly handles Interakt payload format: {type: 'message_received', data: {customer: {channel_phone_number, traits: {name}}, message: {message}}}
AI chatbot uses same RAG pipeline (Claude Sonnet via emergentintegrations) for WhatsApp responses
Human takeover mode correctly prevents AI auto-replies while still storing incoming messages
Auto-lead creation works on first WhatsApp message with source='whatsapp' and inquiry_type='WhatsApp Chat'
Admin send endpoint sends via Interakt API AND saves to conversation history
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Message bubbles correctly styled: customer=white/left, bot=green/right, admin=dark/right
seed_data_creation: Test conversations created via webhook simulation (phone: 9876543210, TEST_* phones)

features_verified.webhook_endpoint: POST /api/webhook/whatsapp accepts Interakt payload and returns 200
features_verified.webhook_ai_processing: message_received event triggers AI processing and stores in wa_conversations
features_verified.webhook_auto_lead: Incoming message auto-creates lead with source=whatsapp
features_verified.webhook_human_mode: In human mode, message stored but AI doesn't auto-reply
features_verified.admin_conversations_list: GET /api/admin/whatsapp/conversations returns list with phone, customer_name, status, unread, last_message
features_verified.admin_send_reply: POST /api/admin/whatsapp/send sends manual reply via Interakt and saves to conversation
features_verified.admin_automate: POST /api/admin/whatsapp/conversations/{phone}/automate switches back to AI mode
features_verified.frontend_nav_link: WhatsApp nav link in admin sidebar
features_verified.frontend_inbox_page: WhatsApp Inbox page shows conversation list
features_verified.frontend_conversation_item: Shows customer name, last message preview, AI BOT/Human badge, unread count
features_verified.frontend_chat_panel: Full chat with message bubbles (customer=white, bot=green, admin=dark)
features_verified.frontend_takeover_button: Take Over button visible and switches to human mode
features_verified.frontend_switch_ai_button: Switch to AI button appears in human mode
features_verified.frontend_reply_input: Reply input bar allows admin to type and send replies
features_verified.frontend_auto_refresh: Auto-refresh every 10 seconds (code verified in AdminWhatsApp.jsx line 130-136)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 WhatsApp Integration fully functional. Interakt API key configured in backend/.env. Test conversation exists with phone 9876543210 (Test User). The wa_conversations collection stores conversations with messages array. Admin can takeover/automate conversations. Auto-lead creation on first WhatsApp message. Previous iterations 1-18 covered other features (products, leads, PDF import, RAG chatbot).
interakt_api_note: Interakt WhatsApp send API is configured but actual message delivery depends on Interakt's service availability. The send endpoint returns success based on Interakt API response.
